category_title: Students who use persistent verbal provocations and insults to disrupt social-emotional learning exercises
scenario_title: Social-Emotional Learning Circle Activity with Fortune-Tellers
minimal_context: The student is seated in a circle with teachers and peers, participating in a guessing game called Fortune-tellers with Emotions to develop an understanding of feelings.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our Fortune-tellers with Emotions game. We will pass this folded paper around the circle.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to start. I wa::nt... you fucking hag.>

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to go in order.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Robin, it is your turn now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: ↑BITCH. Okay give it to me, then. SHUT UP you fucking slut. (leaves his chair, picks up the bag, collects his things) °Shut up°.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our Fortune-tellers with Emotions game. We will pass this folded paper around the circle.

STUDENT: I want to start. I wa::nt... you fucking hag.>

TUTOR: We are going to go in order.

STUDENT: It's just crap.

TUTOR: Robin, it is your turn now.

STUDENT: ↑BITCH. Okay give it to me, then. SHUT UP you fucking slut. (leaves his chair, picks up the bag, collects his things) °Shut up°.

task.content: working with an exercise oriented towards developing the children's understandings of their emotions. The exercise is in the form of a guessing game called Fortune-tellers with Emotions (Sw. Loppor med känslor)
task.learning_goal: developing the children's understandings of their emotions

context.environment: seated in chairs in a circle
context.materials: a tool in the form of a folded piece of paper commonly used in children's games
context.social_setting: group of younger students and the two teachers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Responding to being nominated for a turn in the SEL exercise by teacher Gunnel.
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: ignores the teacher and starts to insult her
related_quotes: Okay give it to me, then

behavior_patterns.condition: Interrupting the teacher's (Mari) turn-allocation during the 'Fortune-tellers with Emotions' circle activity.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: makes several attempts to contest the features of the identities ascribed to him in the turn-taking organization

behavior_patterns.condition: Critiquing the paper 'fortune-teller' tool during the SEL exercise.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: upgrades his oppositional stance towards the teachers' authority and the exercise at hand, now questioning the value of the educational tool used
behavior_patterns.internal_state: distancing himself from some of the belittling elements of the exercise

behavior_patterns.condition: Attempting to leave the classroom and collecting personal belongings while the lesson is still in progress.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: leaves his chair, picks up the bag, collects his things
